title: Prospecting
shortSummary: Finding, researching, and qualifying the right prospects is the engine of your pipeline. Learn cold outreach, trigger research, and account planning that creates real top-of-funnel momentum.
whyItMatters: No prospects, no pipeline, no revenue. Prospecting is the single most important activity for any AE or SDR, yet it's the one most people avoid. The best enterprise SaaS sellers treat prospecting like a discipline: they research systematically, look for trigger events, build a point of view, and target precisely so they spend time on deals that can actually close.
coreConcepts: Account research, trigger events, and persona-based value hypotheses
Warm referrals, social selling, and account-led motions
Building prospect lists and outbound sequences at scale
Cold calling, personalised email, and social selling orchestration
Cross-functional territory planning with SDRs and partners
Multi-threading target accounts before a deal exists
